facelet-taglib.description: OmniFaces Security tag library for jakarta.security.enterprise.SecurityContext authentication and authorization.

tag.description: Conditionally renders content based on role-based access control. Supports checking for a single role, any role from a list, or all roles from a list. Exactly one of the following attributes must be specified: role, anyRole, or allRoles.

attribute.description: Allows content to be rendered if the user has the role specified here. Mutually exclusive with anyRole and allRoles.
attribute.name: role

attribute.description: Allows content to be rendered if the user has any of the comma-separated roles added here. Mutually exclusive with role and allRoles.
attribute.name: anyRole

attribute.description: Allows content to be rendered if the user has all of the comma-separated roles added here. Mutually exclusive with role and anyRole.
attribute.name: allRoles

attribute.description: Name for a boolean EL variable containing the authorization result. Always set regardless of whether content is rendered.
attribute.name: var

tag.description: Allows content to be rendered if the user is anonymous.
Allows content to be rendered if the user is authenticated.
